brand.name: Luma Slice
brand.tagline: Bright pizza, seasonal produce, and neighborhood warmth.

hero.title: Sunshine, served by the slice.
hero.description: Artisan pizzas with seasonal ingredients, slow-fermented dough, and a whole lot of good energy.
hero.imageAlt: Luma Slice artisan margherita pizza with basil and yellow tomatoes

signature.title: The Luma Margherita
signature.description: San Marzano tomatoes, fior di latte, basil, extra virgin olive oil, and sea salt on our airy fermented dough.

dishes.title: Made with season
dishes.description: Crisp produce, long-fermented dough, and bold color in every slice.

menu.title: A slice for every mood
menu.description: Seasonal pies and bright little plates, built for the whole table to try.

story.title: A love letter to sunny days
story.description: Luma Slice brings together local growers, thoughtful flour, and the joy of sharing great pizza. We ferment every dough slowly and fire each pie with care so the ingredients stay bright.

gallery.title: A slice of Luma
gallery.description: Sunlit lunches, fiery ovens, shared pies, and a room full of color.

images.imageAlt: Wood fire inside a pizza oven

items.quote: Best pizza in the neighborhood. The dough is unreal and the ingredients taste so fresh.
items.name: Jessica Kim

items.quote: Consistently perfect every time, with a room that always feels like summer.
items.name: Alex Romero

items.quote: Bright, cozy, and welcoming. You can feel the care in every detail.
items.name: Nina Torres

contact.title: Reserve your table in the sun
contact.description: Planning ahead or celebrating something special? Book a table or order your favorite pie for pickup.

footer.note: Sunlit pizza, slow dough, local ingredients, and a place for everyone.
